tasks: Create user at10 and set password cinder9.
As at10, schedule a job that appends AT10 to /home/at10/at10.log two minutes from now.

Use atq to verify a queued job.
checks: systemctl is-enabled atd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active atd | grep -qx active
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
